reviews.review_description: Bank you doggy for. Mod an the game is so cool from dudelegend

reviews.review_title: Never judge a book by its cover
reviews.review_description: I played the game with my friend yesterday and  the game had so much fun content we couldn’t even finish! Don’t let the mediocre graphics fool you as a newcomer. I loved the mall and the Rehab facility and my friend loved the scrap yard and the beds in Rehab. I truly recommend this game. If you are the owner of this game and you need some music or an extra moderator, you can DM me.
When I first got the game the owner was so nice that he gave me mod
Love the game but the gameplay could look better
This game has funny graphics like the among us block and it has very fun gameplay. also i know the creator and he’s a cool kid trust.
